title: helianthus chartaceus
intro: Helianthus chartaceus, also known as the paperleaf sunflower or paper sunflower, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Helianthus chartaceus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
